hero.question: Will Ubisoft be acquired before 2027?
hero.prob_take: The 10-point dump signals sellers are losing conviction on a deal, likely after Ubisoft's Q3 earnings miss and activist pressure cooling as the stock trades near 52-week lows, making acquisition math harder for any buyer. At 48.5%, the market is pricing in desperation-level M&A when in reality a strategic buyer needs the business to stabilize first, and private equity can't justify the price even with a discount to 2024 highs.

daily_take.headline: Ubisoft Acquisition Odds Crater 10 Points, But The Smart Money Isn't Convinced
daily_take.deck: Ubisoft acquisition odds fell hard to 48.5% on what looks like profit-taking after weeks of M&A buzz. The market's still essentially 50-50, which is the tell. A 10-point drop on $551K volume is noise, not conviction. Sharp bettors should watch whether institutions are actually pulling back or if this is a shakeout before fresh catalysts.
